key_decisions: Admit threshold definition before any automatic include_l0 proposal.
Current evidence is insufficient for automatic inclusion approval.
next_actions: Implement the admitted review-only threshold artifact.
open_questions: Which thresholds should be mandatory gates for any future automatic include_l0 proposal?
risks: Threshold criteria may be misread as automatic inclusion approval unless the review-only boundary remains explicit.
summary_text: PLAN-20260707-0003 was admitted by WARR-20260707-0005 as a review-only threshold definition slice. The current deterministic evidence corpus is insufficient for automatic include_l0 approval. No runtime behavior is admitted.
